project_overview.name: PhysicsLab
project_overview.target_audience: Teenage schoolchildren in Belarus preparing for centralized testing
project_overview.mood: Playful, Engaging, Academic yet Gamified, Friendly

layout_spacing.philosophy: Generous spacing for hero sections, Bento Grid (Mode B) for dashboard density.

surfaces_and_micro_themes.headers: Crystal Glass - backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/60 border-b border-white/10 shadow-sm
surfaces_and_micro_themes.interactive_cards: Hover state: -translate-y-1, shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgba(255,215,0,0.15)], border-[#FFD700]/30 transition-all duration-300
surfaces_and_micro_themes.gamification_elements: Neon glow effects for XP, streaks, and badges. Example: drop-shadow-[0_0_8px_rgba(255,215,0,0.5)]

components_strategy.marketing: Pure HTML/Tailwind with Framer Motion for scroll effects, floating mascot integrations.
components_strategy.app_dashboard: Shadcn components heavily customized to dark theme with yellow active states.

buttons.primary: bg-[#FFD700] text-black hover:bg-[#FFC107] font-bold rounded-full px-6 py-3 transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-white/20 text-white hover:border-[#FFD700]/50 hover:text-[#FFD700] rounded-full px-6 py-3 transition-all

mascot.instructions: Use smiling/pointing on landing page. Explaining for formula cards and chapter view. Shy/cute for empty states, errors, or difficult quizzes.

animation_and_motion.general: Smooth, purposeful motion. Framer motion for page transitions and card entry.
animation_and_motion.gamification: Bouncy, rewarding animations for XP gain and streak increments.
animation_and_motion.mascot: Floating idle animations (translate-y up and down slightly), speech bubbles popping in.

key_screens.landing_page: Hero with mascot pointing/smiling, large Unbounded headings, dark background with subtle glowing physics elements. Use hero_bg as background.
key_screens.course_catalog: Bento grid of physics topics (Mechanics, Optics, etc.), hover effects that glow yellow, progress indicators per topic.
key_screens.chapter_view: Mascot (explaining pose) giving hints. Formula cards with Glassmorphism and flip animations. Quizzes with immediate visual feedback (green/red borders).
key_screens.student_dashboard: Action-first layout. Top card shows XP, Level, and Streak with glowing accents. Recommended next lesson. Recent activity timeline. Use dashboard_bg as background overlay.

testing: All interactive elements (buttons, links, form inputs) MUST include data-testid attribute formatted as kebab-case, role-based. e.g., data-testid='start-quiz-button'
instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the color palette. Do NOT use default blue or purple. Use the provided yellow (#FFD700) and cyan (#00E5FF) accents.
Use Framer Motion to animate the mascot (floating effect) and UI elements (staggered fade-ins).
Build the dashboard using a dense, information-rich Bento layout as defined in layout_spacing.
Embed the provided mascot images intelligently—they are the core of the platform's friendliness.
Ensure high contrast for text over dark backgrounds. Use Tailwind classes like text-white, text-zinc-400.
For gamification (XP, streaks), use visual flair: subtle yellow glow (drop-shadow) and prominent progress bars.
Create .js or .jsx files for frontend components. Do not use .tsx files as per instructions.
